channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-717] ext4 mmp block uses incorrect utsname field for nodename
item.description:
The MMP patch committed to upstream used the init_utsname()->systemname field instead of init_utsname()->nodename field for filling in the MMP block.This incorrectly will cause MMP messages to report the system "Linux" is using the node instead of the correct hostname.

This was introduced in the port of the MMP patches from RHEL5 to RHEL6, not caught during inspection due to the required API change at that line and other massive code reorganization, and then merged upstream to ext4, and also merged back into our RHEL5 MMP patch.

The MMP patches that use sysname should be changed to use nodename instead.
item.summary: ext4 mmp block uses incorrect utsname field for nodename

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-b2_1 » i686,client,el5,inkernel #41
LU-717 ldiskfs: MRP-222 Replace sysname with nodename in MMP (Revision 67479d7c0c3579ced24b90d251d85a0d7f0bdf29)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 67479d7c0c3579ced24b90d251d85a0d7f0bdf29
Files :

  • ldiskfs/kernel_patches/patches/ext4-mmp-sles11.patch
  • ldiskfs/kernel_patches/patches/ext4-mmp-rhel6.patch

LU-717 ldiskfs: MRP-222 Replace sysname with nodename in MMP (Revision 67479d7c0c3579ced24b90d251d85a0d7f0bdf29)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 67479d7c0c3579ced24b90d251d85a0d7f0bdf29
